title: Outer Space Adventure Rectangular Plastic Table Cover (137cm x 213cm) - Vivid & Colorful Galactic Design - Perfect for Parties & Kid's Events - 1 Piece, Grey
features: VIBRANT & COLORFUL DESIGN: Our outer space adventure rectangular plastic table cover features an eye-catching and vivid galactic design that will add a touch of outer space excitement to any party or kid's event.

HIGH-QUALITY PLASTIC MATERIAL: Made from durable plastic, table cover offers excellent protection against spills, stains, and scratches, making it the perfect solution to keep your table clean and mess-free during your celebration.

PERFECT FOR PARTIES & EVENTS: Measuring 137cm x 213cm, this versatile table cover is suitable for various table sizes and shapes, making it an ideal choice for birthday parties, themed events, or even school functions.

REUSABLE & EASY TO CLEAN: Our outer space adventure table cover is a cost-effective and eco-friendly alternative to disposable tablecloths. Simply wipe it down after use and fold it away for the next event - it's that easy
BOOST YOUR PARTY'S ATMOSPHERE: Bring your outer space-themed party to life with this stunning table cover, creating an immersive and memorable experience for your little astronauts and guests.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Ruby Red Pumpkin Orange Sunflower Yellow Powder Blue Bright White Midnight Black Outer Space Birthday Add-On Items Rocket your Birthday party out of this world and WOW your guests with these interstellar designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More Coordinating Ranges Available! If Outer Space isn't your taste, check out our other stylish options. Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights!
